title: Better Shears 3
body:
# Better Shears 3
This mod adds lots of new shears more and less resistant to help the progression in the game !
### Better Shears 3 Durability:
- Cobble: 1
- Wooden: 9
- Gold: 20
- Flint: 35
- Lapis: 85
- Clay: 101
- Copper: 200
- Amethyst: 375
- Diamond: 1549
- Emerald: 1979
- Obsidian: 2999
- Netherite: 4046
- (1.19+) Warden : 6146
- Infinite: Unbreakable

### Better Shears 2 Durability:
- Wooden: 9
- Flint: 35
- Gold: 20
- Clay: 101
- Lapis: 275
- (1.17+) Copper: 200
- Diamond: 1549
- Obsidian: 745
- Emerald: 1979
- (1.16+) Netherite: 2999
- Infinite: Unbreakable
